_comment_: Phase 1 PoC C2 (2026-05-15): Monitor daemon SSoT (monitor-policy.html §5.1)。admin-inbox-tail のみ minimal scope、phaser-mailbox-tail は Cluster 5 で admin-cycle 本格実装時に追加予定。Plugin loader が plugin load 時に background process を自動起動 + cleanup。schema: top-level array of monitor objects (Claude Code plugin loader 期待 schema、change 001-spec-purify Phase G で object 形式から array 形式に修正)。
description: administrator mailbox event stream (Phase 1 PoC C2 配置、C5 で active 化)
command: mkdir -p .mailbox/administrator .supervisor && touch .mailbox/administrator/inbox.jsonl && tail -F .mailbox/administrator/inbox.jsonl | jq -rc --unbuffered 'select(.event != null) | "[\(.event)] from=\(.from) ts=\(.ts) detail=\(.detail // {} | tojson)"'
